args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the closure of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued to ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd export data has been confirmed: deletion on 2026-06-13, 30 days after access revocation.

args.comment: Access revoked, refund issued, deletion schedule confirmed.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd offboarding is complete: data exported, access revoked, refund issued, and deletion scheduled.
